name: yt-dlp-clipper
$comment-baseline: builtin-baseline pins the ENTIRE dependency graph (ffmpeg + every codec + build-helper ports) to one vcpkg snapshot. It is the latest release tag, so its MSYS2 build-tool download URLs are live (an older snapshot's URLs rot as MSYS2 drops old revisions).
$comment-override: ffmpeg-the-third 1.2 targets the FFmpeg 6.x API, so override ffmpeg down from the baseline's 8.x to the newest 6.x. Everything else stays at the baseline snapshot.
